Pars.description: Promoter of ars operon. Repressed by ArsR, induced by arsenate or arsenite.

P43.description: Strong promoter activity during exponential and stationary phase.

mRuby_with_RBS(Bsubtilis).description: mRuby with ribosomal binding site for Bacillus

Ptet_tetR.description: Ptet inducible promoter with tetR. Tet inducible

Pman_manR.description: Pman inducible promoter with manR. Inducible with mannose.

P3P.description: Ultra strong constitutive promoter. 42-13x stronger than Pveg

TO_pE194ts.description: pE194ts is a temperature sensitive origin in Bacillus subtilis. Can be used for curable plasmids.

TO_pHT315.description: pHT315 ~15 copies in Bacillus subtiis. NOTE 897 was mutated G->A to prevent BsaI cut site. Theta replication.
